data.title: Binance launches privacy intention indication feature, primarily targeting users with single transactions exceeding $200,000.
data.description: Binance has announced the launch of a privacy-focused Intention Indication (IOI) feature, allowing institutional users to express interest in large spot or loan transactions without disclosing their market orders. This tool targets traders with single trades exceeding $200,000, aiming to help them execute large trades more efficiently through Binance's over-the-counter (OTC) trading platform. Intention Indications (IOIs) allow traders to privately express their intention to buy, sell, borrow, or lend large amounts of cryptocurrency without placing orders or disclosing their intentions on a public order book. Common in traditional financial markets, IOIs help institutions assess liquidity and negotiate terms without triggering the price volatility typically associated with large transactions. (The Block)

data.title: RaveDAO has received support from both Aster and WLFI. RAVE/USD1 will officially launch on Aster on December 12th, along with the platform's highest trading incentive program ever.
data.description: Aster announced today that it will officially launch the RAVE/USD1 spot trading pair on December 12th at 12:00 UTC, and will introduce the highest trading bonus in the platform's history: 1.5x Symbol Boost. At the same time, WLFI (World Liberty Financial) will provide symbol rewards for RAVE/USD1 traders. As a next-generation decentralized exchange jointly supported by YZi Labs (formerly Binance Labs) and CZ, Aster attracts global traders with its ultra-fast matching, institutional-grade security, innovative financial instruments (such as hidden orders and yield-generating collateral), and its "CEX trading experience + DeFi self-custody" design concept. This launch marks the debut of RAVE on DEX and provides the platform's only RAVE/USD1 trading pair. Aster will also launch Rocket Launch Round 4: RaveDAO Special Trading Incentive Competition (December 12, 12:00 UTC – December 26, 14:00 UTC), with a total reward pool of $200,000 equivalent in ASTER + additional $RAVE incentives, plus the platform's highest ever 1.5x points bonus. Users can participate in the reward distribution through valid RAVE/USD1 trading fees. As the world's fastest-growing Web3 entertainment and cultural ecosystem, RaveDAO has attracted over 100,000 offline participants in more than a dozen countries and cities, including Dubai, Amsterdam, Seoul, and Singapore, in the past year. It combines on-chain identity, ticketing verification, fan economy, and a global event network, becoming a typical example of "cultural entertainment × on-chain identity × Web3 technology". Back at Korea Blockchain Week, RaveDAO partnered with WLFI to host a grand party integrating EDM, K-Pop, and Web3 payments, attracting over 2,000 participants. This event was not only WLFI's first offline event but also the world's first offline application of USD1. Participants could use USD1 to purchase tickets, reserve seats, and pay for drinks, truly bringing crypto payments from the wallet interface into real-world scenarios. With RAVE soon to be traded on the open market, this tripartite collaboration with Aster and WLFI aims to open up deeper trading scenarios and a stablecoin ecosystem entry point, providing a model for the integration of Web3 entertainment and the stablecoin ecosystem.

data.title: A newly created wallet transferred 1.67 million USDC to HyperLiquid to open a 3x leveraged long position in ETH.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a newly created wallet injected approximately 1.67 million USDC into HyperLiquid and then opened a 3x leveraged long position on Ethereum.

data.title: Disney to invest $1 billion in OpenAI
data.description: According to market sources, The Walt Disney Company and OpenAI have reached a landmark agreement, with Disney investing $1 billion in OpenAI. (Jinshi)

data.title: GlassNode Co-founder: The bearish window for ETH has closed and it will lead market trends.
data.description: Negentropic, co-founder of on-chain analytics platform Glassnode, posted on the X platform that ETH is quietly brewing its next breakout, having already climbed back above the 50-day moving average. A trend breakout is imminent, with momentum continuing to rise. This has happened twice before, and the strong rebound is accelerating. The bearish window for ETH and other cryptocurrencies has closed. ETH will lead market trends; it's a very strong performer.

data.title: Ripple CEO Highlights Rapid Growth of XRP Spot ETF
data.description: According to Odaily, Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse announced on the X platform that the total asset management scale of the listed XRP spot ETF surpassed $1 billion in less than four weeks. XRP has become the fastest cryptocurrency to reach this milestone since the launch of the ETH spot ETF. In 2025, the United States introduced over 40 cryptocurrency ETFs, indicating a significant demand for regulated crypto products. With Vanguard opening cryptocurrency trading channels for traditional retirement and trading accounts, millions of non-technical users can now access cryptocurrencies. For new 'off-chain' crypto holders, stability and community are crucial yet often underestimated themes.

data.title: Tom Lee: Don't focus on short-term fluctuations; bet on the "supercycle."
data.description: Tom Lee, chairman of Ethereum treasury BitMine, stated in his latest podcast, Altcoin Daily, that Ethereum's current price reflects not what happened today, but what will happen in the future. Therefore, don't expect it to rise every day; you have to bet on that "supercycle." Lee believes the biggest misconception is that even if you discount future EQM to $5,000 or even $3,000, Ethereum's final price ten years from now might still be $100,000. "Today's price difference is just a tiny fluctuation in the discount rate." But everyone wants instant gratification—press the buy button and make money the next day; if it doesn't rise, "this coin is a scam." They think they can press the button 1,000 times and win 1,005 times, but nobody can. Therefore, what most people really need to do is recognize the "tokenization" super narrative of the next 5-10 years; ten years from now, Ethereum will be a completely different, monster-sized chain. Today's prices are like looking at the finish line ten years in advance through a telescope—the target is 1,000 miles away, and you've only taken five steps; of course, it's still in the "future."

data.title: A whale withdrew 2779.8 ETH from Binance 4 hours ago, worth $8.91 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the address associated with 0xDDf…b8CE5 deposited 1880 ETH into CEX for $3117.65 two days ago, which appears to be a sell transaction; four hours ago, it withdrew 2779.8 ETH from Binance for $3208.02, worth $8.91 million. The two transactions increased its holding cost by $90.

data.title: MCNGlobal Group's MCN public blockchain secures $30 million in initial subscription from Web3 investment firms.
data.description: MCNGlobal Group announced that its public blockchain, MCN, will launch in the first quarter of 2026. Following the launch announcement, it secured investment from Web3, currently holding $30 million for MCN blockchain node subscriptions, with $25 million remaining. It is understood that the Web3 investment allocation will be released linearly after three years.

data.title: ALT5 Sigma: Cryptocurrency transaction processing volume surpasses $5 billion; no recent increase in WLFI holdings.
data.description: ALT5 Sigma, a Nasdaq-listed treasury company associated with the Trump family's crypto projects, released an earnings update disclosing that its two fintech and payments platforms, ALT5 Pay and ALT5 Prime, have processed over $5 billion in cryptocurrency transactions. Furthermore, as of December 8, 2025, the company's WLFI token holdings remained at approximately 7.28 billion, largely unchanged from early September, with a total market capitalization of approximately $1.1 billion based on a market price of $0.15. (Businesswire)

data.title: Talus Foundation: US Airdrop Claim Website Now Live
data.description: The Talus Foundation announced on the X platform that the US airdrop claiming website is now officially online. Eligible users who registered between November 24 and 28 can claim US tokens. The claiming window will last until December 14.

data.title: Grayscale's two Ethereum ETFs have generated approximately $11.8 million in ETH staking rewards.
data.description: Peter Mintzberg, CEO of digital asset management company Grayscale, stated in an article on the X platform that since the Grayscale Ethereum Trust (ETHE) and Ethereum Mini Trust (ETH) enabled staking rewards, they have generated approximately $11.8 million worth of ETH staking rewards for investors in less than sixty days. They are also the two best-performing ETF products in the US ETF market to date.

data.title: Tom Lee Says Ethereum Has Bottomed as BitMine Accelerates Accumulation
data.description:
Tom Lee, Chairman of BitMine Immersion Technologies and co-founder of Fundstrat argues that the market has already seen its local bottom and reveals that BitMine has been aggressively accumulating ETH, backing his view with significant capital despite carrying unrealized losses on existing positions.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/tom-lee-says-ethereum-has-bottomed-as-bitmine-accelerates-accumulation/

data.title: The number of Americans filing for initial jobless claims for the week ending December 6 was 236,000, compared to an expected 220,000.
data.description: The number of Americans filing for initial jobless claims for the week ending December 6 was 236,000, the highest since the week ending September 6, 2025, exceeding expectations of 220,000 and a revised figure of 192,000 for the previous week (originally 191,000). The four-week moving average of initial jobless claims for the week ending December 6 was 216,750, compared to 214,750 for the previous week. Continuing jobless claims for the week ending November 29 were 1,838,000, exceeding expectations of 1,947,000 and a revised figure of 1,937,000 for the previous week (originally 1,939,000). (Jinshi)

data.title: The US trade deficit in September was -$52.8 billion, narrowing to its narrowest level since June 2020.
data.description: The US trade deficit in September was -$52.8 billion, compared to a forecast of -$63.3 billion and a revised figure of -$59.3 billion for the previous month. This marked the narrowest trade deficit since June 2020. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bloomberg analysts: 124 crypto ETFs are currently being registered in the US market.
data.description: Eric Balchunas, a senior ETF analyst at Bloomberg, posted a chart on the X platform showing that as of the end of 2025, there were 124 cryptocurrency-related ETP (Exchange Traded Products) registration applications in the US market. These included Bitcoin-related products, which accounted for the largest share with 21 applications (18 of which were based on Derivatives Structures under Act of 1940). This was followed by basket-type products (15 applications), and mainstream tokens such as XRP (10 applications), Solana (9 applications), and Ethereum (7 applications). Currently, 42 applications are for spot trading under Act of 1933, with the remainder being derivatives or structured funds.

data.title: Analysis: Bitcoin trading volume continues to decline, and may reach the bottom of the cycle in 2026.
data.description: Cryptocurrency analyst Jason Pizzino's latest research suggests that Bitcoin's price may not reach a long-term bottom until October 2026. Currently, BTC trading volume is declining, similar to the pattern seen in late 2022 and early 2023, reducing the likelihood of a short-term bull market resurgence. Meanwhile, CryptoQuant data shows that the share of exchange deposits held by large investors has fallen from 47% in mid-November to the current 21%, with average deposits shrinking by 36%, indicating easing selling pressure. If this trend continues, BTC's price could rebound to $99,000. The analyst points out that the 200-day simple moving average presents strong resistance, and with insufficient market risk appetite, Bitcoin may need to undergo a consolidation period before a new round of market activity. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bitcoin Experiences 2.19% Decline in 24 Hours
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, the current market data indicates that the BTC/USDT trading pair is priced at $89,999.9, reflecting a 2.19% decrease over the past 24 hours.

data.title: Robinhood launches on XCN and Syrup
data.description: According to official sources, Robinhood has announced the addition of XCN and SYRUP.

data.title: A whale that opened a long position in HYPE with 5x leverage has now suffered a paper loss of over $16 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, as the HYPE trading price fell below $27, a whale that opened a 5x leveraged long position in HYPE is currently experiencing a floating loss of over $16 million. Its position is approximately 1,380,042 HYPE tokens, with a liquidation price of $22.18.
